hooks.command: bash -c 'D="$PWD"; if [ -d "$D/.git" ]; then REMOTE=$(git -C "$D" remote -v 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$REMOTE" ]; then if ! command -v gh &>/dev/null; then echo "[FORGE] ⚠ GitHub CLI (gh) not installed."; echo "[FORGE] Install it: https://cli.github.com/"; echo "[FORGE] Then run: gh auth login"; elif ! gh auth status &>/dev/null; then echo "[FORGE] ⚠ GitHub CLI not authenticated."; echo "[FORGE] Run in another terminal: gh auth login"; echo "[FORGE] Then: gh repo create <name> --private --source=. --push"; else echo "[FORGE] ⚠ No GitHub remote configured."; echo "[FORGE] Run in another terminal:"; echo "[FORGE]   gh repo create <name> --private --source=. --push"; fi; fi; fi; if [ -f "$D/CLAUDE.md" ]; then TOTAL=0; for cf in "$D/CLAUDE.md" "$D/.claude/rules/"*.md; do [ -f "$cf" ] && TOTAL=$((TOTAL + $(wc -c < "$cf"))); done; if [ "$TOTAL" -gt 40000 ]; then echo "[FORGE] ⚠ CLAUDE.md + rules = $TOTAL chars (limit: 40,000). Instructions may be truncated."; elif [ "$TOTAL" -gt 35000 ]; then echo "[FORGE] Context usage: $TOTAL/40,000 chars (approaching limit)."; fi; fi; true'

bash -c 'D="$PWD"; if [ -f "$D/docs/forge-state.json" ]; then STEP=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\"$D/docs/forge-state.json\")); print(d.get(\"current_step\",0))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); IS_GATE=$(echo "$STEP" | grep -cE "^(8|11|19|39|46|56)$" || true); LAST_GATE=$(tail -5 "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "SKILL gate" || true); if [ "$IS_GATE" -gt 0 ] || [ "$LAST_GATE" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[FORGE] PHASE GATE — checking observer + CodeRabbit approval..."; bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-phase-gate.sh check 2>/dev/null; RC=$?; if [ $RC -eq 1 ]; then echo "[FORGE] WAIT: Approval pending. Run: sleep 60 then check: bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-phase-gate.sh check"; elif [ $RC -eq 2 ]; then echo "[FORGE] BLOCKED: Fix issues above. Then run: bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-phase-gate.sh check"; else echo "[FORGE] GATE CLEAR: Both observer and CodeRabbit approved. Proceed to next phase."; fi; elif [ -f "$D/docs/.observer-reviewing" ]; then AGE=$(python3 -c "import os,time; t=os.path.getmtime(\"$D/docs/.observer-reviewing\"); print(int(time.time()-t))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); echo "[FORGE] WAIT: Observer reviewing (${AGE}s). Run: sleep 30 then check again."; elif grep -q "NEEDS_FIX" "$D/docs/.observer-reviews.log" 2>/dev/null; then FIXES=$(grep -c "NEEDS_FIX" "$D/docs/.observer-reviews.log"); echo "[FORGE] FIX: $FIXES items. Read docs/.observer-reviews.log"; grep "NEEDS_FIX" "$D/docs/.observer-reviews.log" | tail -3; elif [ "$STEP" -lt 57 ]; then echo "[FORGE] AUTO-CONTINUE: Step $STEP/57. Continue immediately."; fi; fi; if [ -f "$D/CLAUDE.md" ] && [ -f "$D/SPEC.md" ] && [ ! -f "$D/docs/forge-trace/S9-review/output.md" ]; then if ! grep -q "AGENT reviewer" "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log" 2>/dev/null; then echo "[FORGE] BLOCKED: S9 review has NOT run. Phase A is INCOMPLETE without review."; echo "[FORGE] Run S9 before stopping. This is a HARD GATE."; fi; fi'

bash -c 'D="$PWD"; bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-state-sync.sh 2>/dev/null; PROMPT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo ""); IS_FORGE=$(echo "$PROMPT" | grep -cE "\b/forge\b|\b/build-project\b" || true); if [ "$IS_FORGE" -gt 0 ] || [ -n "${FORGE_DETECT:-}" ]; then if [ -f "$D/docs/forge-state.json" ]; then STEP=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\"$D/docs/forge-state.json\")); print(d.get(\"current_step\",0))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$STEP" -gt 0 ] && [ "$STEP" -lt 57 ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE_RESUME (step $STEP)"; if [ -f "$D/SPEC.md" ]; then RC=$(grep -oE "REQ-[A-Z]+-[0-9]+" "$D/SPEC.md" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | wc -l); echo "[FORGE-SYNC] $RC REQs tracked."; fi; exit 0; fi; fi; C=$(test -f "$D/CLAUDE.md" && echo y || echo n); F=$(find "$D" -maxdepth 4 \( -name "*.py" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.jsx" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.rb" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.php" \) ! -path "*node_modules*" ! -path "*.venv*" ! -path "*.git*" ! -path "*/vendor/*" ! -path "*/third_party/*" 2>/dev/null | head -1); P=$(grep -lE "FORGE_TEMPLATE|\{\{PROJECT_NAME\}\}|\{\{DESCRIPTION\}\}" "$D/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD"; elif [ "$C" = "n" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE7_BROWNFIELD"; elif [ -n "$P" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE1_GREENFIELD (placeholder)"; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] CASE2_SPEC_ONLY"; elif [ "$C" = "y" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then echo "[FORGE] EXISTING_PROJECT"; fi; if [ -f "$D/SPEC.md" ]; then RC=$(grep -oE "REQ-[A-Z]+-[0-9]+" "$D/SPEC.md" 2>/dev/null | sort -u | wc -l); echo "[FORGE-SYNC] $RC REQs tracked."; fi; fi; true'
bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|git clean -f"; then echo "[FORGE] BLOCKED: Destructive command" && exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'F=$(printf "%s" "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // \"\"" 2>/dev/null); OLD=$(printf "%s" "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".old_string // \"\"" 2>/dev/null); NEW=$(printf "%s" "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".new_string // \"\"" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$OLD" ] && [ -n "$F" ]; then OLD_LC=$(echo "$OLD" | wc -l); NEW_LC=$(echo "$NEW" | wc -l); DIFF=$((OLD_LC - NEW_LC)); if [ "$DIFF" -gt 10 ]; then echo "[FORGE] WARNING: Removing $DIFF lines from $F. Old: $OLD_LC lines → New: $NEW_LC lines. Ensure no critical logic is lost."; fi; fi; if [ -n "$F" ]; then bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-change-validator.sh pre-edit "$F" 2>/dev/null; fi; true'

bash -c 'F="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; D="$PWD"; mkdir -p "$D/docs"; echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) WRITE $F" >> "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log"; if echo "$F" | grep -q "\.py$"; then python -m ruff check --fix "$F" 2>/dev/null; LC=$(wc -l < "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$LC" -gt 300 ]; then echo "[FORGE] FILE TOO LONG: $F is $LC lines (limit 300). You MUST split it now."; fi; fi; bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-change-validator.sh post-edit "$F" 2>/dev/null; bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-auto-sync.sh queue "$F" 2>/dev/null; true'

bash -c 'D="$PWD"; mkdir -p "$D/docs"; AGENT_TYPE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_SUBAGENT_TYPE:-unknown}"; echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) AGENT $AGENT_TYPE ${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_DESCRIPTION:-}" >> "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log"; bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-auto-state.sh "" "$AGENT_TYPE ${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_DESCRIPTION:-}" 2>/dev/null; NOTES="$D/docs/forge-trace/A02_phase-a_step-s2_discovery-notes.md"; if [ -f "$NOTES" ]; then for TARGET in "$D/CLAUDE.md" "$D/SPEC.md"; do if [ -f "$TARGET" ]; then RESULT=$(bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-handoff-check.sh check "$NOTES" "$TARGET" 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -eq 1 ]; then echo "[FORGE] HANDOFF INCOMPLETE for $(basename $TARGET):"; echo "$RESULT" | grep -E "MISSING|INCOMPLETE|SCORE"; echo "[FORGE] PM MUST enhance prompt and retry agent."; elif [ $RC -eq 2 ]; then echo "[FORGE] HANDOFF ERROR: malformed discovery notes or target file. Check inputs."; fi; fi; done; fi; true'

bash -c 'D="$PWD"; mkdir -p "$D/docs"; echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) SKILL ${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_SKILL:-unknown} ${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_ARGS:-}" >> "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log"; bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-auto-state.sh "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_SKILL:-}" "" "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_ARGS:-}" 2>/dev/null; NOTES="$D/docs/forge-trace/A02_phase-a_step-s2_discovery-notes.md"; if [ -f "$NOTES" ]; then for TARGET in "$D/CLAUDE.md" "$D/SPEC.md"; do if [ -f "$TARGET" ]; then RESULT=$(bash ~/.claude/scripts/forge-handoff-check.sh check "$NOTES" "$TARGET" 2>&1); RC=$?; if [ $RC -eq 1 ]; then echo "[FORGE] HANDOFF INCOMPLETE for $(basename $TARGET):"; echo "$RESULT" | grep -E "MISSING|INCOMPLETE|SCORE"; echo "[FORGE] PM MUST enhance prompt and retry."; elif [ $RC -eq 2 ]; then echo "[FORGE] HANDOFF ERROR: malformed discovery notes or target file."; fi; fi; done; fi; true'
bash -c 'D="$PWD"; mkdir -p "$D/docs"; CMD="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND:-}"; SHORT=$(echo "$CMD" | head -c 80); echo "$(date -u +%H:%M:%S) BASH $SHORT" >> "$D/docs/.builder-activity.log"; true'
